title: crotalaria rangei
intro: Crotalaria rangei, also known as Rangei's rattlebox, is a plant species from the legume family, Crotalaria. The medicinal properties of this plant have been studied for their potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria rangei include its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce oxidative stress in the body. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria rangei, such as tea or extracts, are traditionally used in some cultures to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
